markdown.markdown:
Hi there! A little bit about me is that I am a senior college student pursuing a degree in Mathematics with a concentration in Statistics and Probability, along with a minor in Computer Science. My academic experience has equipped me with a strong foundation in statistical modeling, data analysis, and computational problem-solving.
I am particularly interested in transforming data into meaningful insights that support decision-making. Through my coursework and projects, I have worked with tools such as R, Python, and SQL to analyze datasets, build predictive models, and communicate results effectively.
I am currently seeking opportunities in data analytics where I can apply my quantitative skills, continue learning, and contribute to data-driven solutions in a collaborative environment.

Some fun/interesting facts about me are I used to work as a barista, which taught me how to stay calm under pressure, multitask efficiently, and remember orders like a pro — skills I now bring into data-heavy work environments. Through this, I also found a hobby of making and curating coffee and teat drinks and love to try new places that opened up. 
As a mathematics major focused on statistics and probability, I enjoy finding patterns in data and turning numbers into meaningful insights. I am proficient in Vietnamese, which allows me to connect with diverse communities and bring a broader perspective to collaborative environments.
markdown.srcMarkdownNoYaml:
## About Me

Hi there! A little bit about me is that I am a senior college student pursuing a degree in Mathematics with a concentration in Statistics and Probability, along with a minor in Computer Science. My academic experience has equipped me with a strong foundation in statistical modeling, data analysis, and computational problem-solving.
I am particularly interested in transforming data into meaningful insights that support decision-making. Through my coursework and projects, I have worked with tools such as R, Python, and SQL to analyze datasets, build predictive models, and communicate results effectively.
I am currently seeking opportunities in data analytics where I can apply my quantitative skills, continue learning, and contribute to data-driven solutions in a collaborative environment.

Some fun/interesting facts about me are I used to work as a barista, which taught me how to stay calm under pressure, multitask efficiently, and remember orders like a pro — skills I now bring into data-heavy work environments. Through this, I also found a hobby of making and curating coffee and teat drinks and love to try new places that opened up. 
As a mathematics major focused on statistics and probability, I enjoy finding patterns in data and turning numbers into meaningful insights. I am proficient in Vietnamese, which allows me to connect with diverse communities and bring a broader perspective to collaborative environments.
